---
title: "Corrigendum to “Microplastics in Santos São Vicente estuarine – Hotspot in sediments caused by low energy hydrodynamic events in strongly populated areas” [Mar. Pollut. Bull. (2024) 117286]"
date: 2025-02-01
author:
  - name: Parra, Duclerc Fernandes
  - name: Gimiliani, Giovana Teixeira
  - name: Dos Santos, Jacinete Lima
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus Ursus
  - name: Schepis, William Rodriguez
  - name: Bereczki, Allan
  - name: Da Cunha Pascoal, Diego Roberto
  - name: Cotrim, Marycel Elena Barboza
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Marine Pollution Bulletin"
  volume: 211
  doi: "10.1016/j.marpolbul.2024.117449"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Corrigendum to “Microplastics in Santos São Vicente estuarine – Hotspot in sediments caused by low energy hydrodynamic events in strongly populated areas” [Mar. Pollut. Bull. (2024) 117286]</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
